title: dianthus caryophyllus subsp. sylvestris
intro: Dianthus caryophyllus subsp. sylvestris, also known as wild carnation, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dianthus caryophyllus subsp. sylvestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be applied directly to the affected area to reap its medicinal benefits.
